# HERWAY

Project: HERWAY women-by-women taxi website (UK)
Owner: HERWAY
Design and Copyright: Octopye Digital Designs (https://octopye.com)

## Scope
- Public marketing and booking website
- Female-first transport service messaging
- Driver onboarding and compliance pages
- Legal, privacy, and terms documentation

## Important Pages
- index.html
- book.html
- drivers.html
- about.html
- contact.html
- legal.html
- privacy-policy.html
- terms-of-service.html

## Policy Notes
- Female-first service model
- Safeguarding and disclosure expectations for bookings
- UK legal and compliance positioning included in legal pages

## Copyright
Copyrighted to HERWAY Octopye Digital Designs (https://octopye.com) Created
